notes:
AI triage (claude): Self-contained build incorrectly requires external .NET 9.0 runtime instead of embedding .NET 10 as expected for SC packages.
Approach: Verify TargetFramework is net10.0 and self-contained publish config correctly sets RuntimeIdentifier and SelfContained=true so the embedded runtime is .NET 10, not a stale .NET 9 reference.
